command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.118 '
# Fix /etc/hosts for vm-ecosystem hostname
echo jose | sudo -S bash -c "grep -q vm-ecosystem /etc/hosts || echo 127.0.1.1 vm-ecosystem >> /etc/hosts"
echo HOSTS_FIXED
# Set standard password
echo jose | sudo -S bash -c "echo jose:M3gh@n!97\& | chpasswd"
echo PASS_SET
# Verify no more hostname resolution warnings
sudo whoami && echo SUDO_CLEAN
' 2>&1
